## Description

A clear and concise description of the bug.

## Steps to reproduce

1. ...
2. ...
3. ...

## Expected behaviour

What you expected to happen.

## Actual behaviour

What actually happened. Include any error dialog text verbatim.

## Sample TCX (if applicable)

Attach a minimal `.tcx` file that triggers the issue (strip personal data).

- TcxEditor version:
- OS / build:
- .NET runtime:

## Additional context

Logs, screenshots, anything else that helps.
